about_page.meta_title: About Us — China Sourcing & Factory Audit Experts
about_page.meta_description: Meet the team behind OnSite Sourcing. 15+ years of on-the-ground China sourcing experience, 1,200+ factories audited across 60+ Chinese cities.
about_page.hero_subtitle: We're a team of supply chain professionals who believe that sourcing from China shouldn't be a gamble. We physically visit factories so you don't have to.
about_page.story_p1: OnSite Sourcing was founded in 2018 after our founder, Michael Chen, spent a decade watching international buyers make the same expensive mistakes: trusting Alibaba profiles, ordering from unverified suppliers, and discovering quality issues only after containers arrived at port.
about_page.story_p2: We built a team of bilingual sourcing professionals who combine deep knowledge of Chinese manufacturing with rigorous due diligence methodology. Every factory we recommend has been physically visited, verified, and documented.
about_page.story_p3: Today, we've audited over 1,200 factories across 60+ Chinese cities, serving 500+ clients worldwide — from hardware startups in Silicon Valley to fashion brands in London and furniture retailers in Dubai.
about_page.value_1_desc: We show you the real factory — not staged photos or curated tours. If a factory has issues, you'll know about them.
about_page.value_2_desc: We are 100% paid by our clients. We never accept kickbacks, commissions, or referral fees from factories. Our only interest is yours.
about_page.value_3_desc: No remote verification. No virtual tours. We believe that supplier due diligence requires physical presence — and we deliver it.
about_page.cta_description: Let our experienced sourcing professionals find and verify your next manufacturing partner in China.

how_it_works_page.meta_description: Our 5-step due diligence process for China factory audits and supplier verification. From discovery call to negotiation handoff — see how we protect your supply chain.
how_it_works_page.hero_subtitle: Our methodology is based on 15+ years of supply chain auditing experience. We don't just find factories — we verify them, document them, and help you build lasting supply chain relationships.
how_it_works_page.diff_1_desc: We use Chinese-language databases, trade networks, and local government registries to find factories that don't list on English platforms.
how_it_works_page.diff_2_desc: We walk every production floor, inspect equipment, interview management, and document everything with photos and video.
how_it_works_page.diff_3_desc: We don't disappear after the report. We support negotiations, facilitate introductions, and provide 30 days of post-trip communication.
how_it_works_page.cta_title: Ready to Start Your Sourcing Journey?
how_it_works_page.cta_description: Book a free discovery call. We'll learn about your product, budget, and timeline — then design a trip that fits.
how_it_works_page.why_different_point_1_desc: We use Chinese-language databases, trade networks, and local government registries to find factories that don't list on English platforms.
how_it_works_page.why_different_point_2_desc: We walk every production floor, inspect equipment, interview management, and document everything with photos and video.
how_it_works_page.why_different_point_3_desc: We don't disappear after the report. We support negotiations, facilitate introductions, and provide 30 days of post-trip communication.
